title: goodenia goodeniacea
intro: Goodenia goodeniacea, also known as Goodenia, is a native Australian plant that belongs to the Goodeniaceae family, and is often referred to as a 'native violet' due to its small, delicate purple flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Goodenia include the ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and boost the immune system. Goodenia is commonly prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil, and is also used in traditional remedies for skin conditions and digestive issues.
